option.name: originalContent
option.value:
# Application APP_PORT=3000 NODE_ENV=development
# Database DB_HOST=localhost DB_PORT=5432 DB_USER=arbidex DB_PASSWORD=arbidex_pass DB_NAME=arbidex_db
# JWT JWT_ACCESS_SECRET=your_access_secret_change_in_production JWT_REFRESH_SECRET=your_refresh_secret_change_in_production JWT_ACCESS_EXPIRES_IN=15m JWT_REFRESH_EXPIRES_IN=7d
# CORS CORS_ORIGIN=http://localhost:4200

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Application APP_PORT=3006 NODE_ENV=development
# Database DB_HOST=localhost DB_PORT=5432 DB_USER=arbidex DB_PASSWORD=arbidex_pass DB_NAME=arbidex_db
# JWT JWT_ACCESS_SECRET=your_access_secret_change_in_production JWT_REFRESH_SECRET=your_refresh_secret_change_in_production JWT_ACCESS_EXPIRES_IN=15m JWT_REFRESH_EXPIRES_IN=7d
# CORS CORS_ORIGIN=http://localhost:4200

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
services: postgres: image: postgres:16-alpine container_name: arbidex_postgres restart: unless-stopped environment: POSTGRES_USER: arbidex POSTGRES_PASSWORD: arbidex_pass POSTGRES_DB: arbidex_db ports: - '5432:5432' volumes: - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data healthcheck: test: ['CMD-SHELL', 'pg_isready -U arbidex -d arbidex_db'] interval: 10s timeout: 5s retries: 5
server: build: context: ./arbi-dex-server dockerfile: Dockerfile container_name: arbidex_server restart: unless-stopped ports: - '3006:3006' environment: APP_PORT: 3006 NODE_ENV: production DB_HOST: postgres DB_PORT: 5432 DB_USER: arbidex DB_PASSWORD: arbidex_pass DB_NAME: arbidex_db JWT_ACCESS_SECRET: ${JWT_ACCESS_SECRET:-super-secret-access-key} JWT_REFRESH_SECRET: ${JWT_REFRESH_SECRET:-super-secret-refresh-key} JWT_ACCESS_EXPIRES_IN: 15m JWT_REFRESH_EXPIRES_IN: 7d CORS_ORIGIN: http://localhost:4200 depends_on: postgres: condition: service_healthy
frontend: build: context: ./arbi-dex dockerfile: Dockerfile container_name: arbidex_frontend restart: unless-stopped ports: - '8231:80' environment: API_BASE_URL: /api depends_on: - server
volumes: postgres_data:

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
services: postgres: image: postgres:16-alpine container_name: arbidex_postgres restart: unless-stopped environment: POSTGRES_USER: arbidex POSTGRES_PASSWORD: arbidex_pass POSTGRES_DB: arbidex_db ports: - '5432:5432' volumes: - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data healthcheck: test: ['CMD-SHELL', 'pg_isready -U arbidex -d arbidex_db'] interval: 10s timeout: 5s retries: 5
server: build: context: ./arbi-dex-server dockerfile: Dockerfile container_name: arbidex_server restart: unless-stopped ports: - '3006:3006' environment: APP_PORT: 3006 NODE_ENV: production DB_HOST: postgres DB_PORT: 5432 DB_USER: arbidex DB_PASSWORD: arbidex_pass DB_NAME: arbidex_db JWT_ACCESS_SECRET: ${JWT_ACCESS_SECRET:-super-secret-access-key} JWT_REFRESH_SECRET: ${JWT_REFRESH_SECRET:-super-secret-refresh-key} JWT_ACCESS_EXPIRES_IN: 15m JWT_REFRESH_EXPIRES_IN: 7d CORS_ORIGIN: '*' depends_on: postgres: condition: service_healthy
frontend: build: context: ./arbi-dex dockerfile: Dockerfile container_name: arbidex_frontend restart: unless-stopped ports: - '8231:80' environment: API_BASE_URL: http://45.135.182.251:3006/api depends_on: - server
volumes: postgres_data:
